colorDescriptions.obsidianBlack: Matte black fleece with warm ivory and tonal trim.
colorDescriptions.deepOlive: Muted olive with a quiet studio utility character.
colorDescriptions.softIvory: Warm ivory with a clean gallery-light finish.
colorDescriptions.darkCocoa: Deep cocoa with restrained European tailoring energy.
colorDescriptions.mutedGold: Soft gold knit with a subdued satin interior.
colorDescriptions.mutedWarmGold: Soft warm gold with a quiet satin interior.
colorDescriptions.fallback: Editorial colorway with understated AMAMBRA detailing.

signature.title: Signature Collection
signature.description: The defining AMAMBRA pieces: satin-lined essentials, tactile warmth, and quiet luxury streetwear.

heritage.title: Heritage Collection
heritage.description: Minimal silhouettes with subtle African textile rhythm, built for a modern European wardrobe.

essentials.title: Essentials
essentials.description: Everyday premium layers that make the whole wardrobe feel considered.

atelier.title: Atelier
atelier.description: Tailored utility pieces designed with an editorial eye and year-round function.

signatureSatinHood.title: Signature Satin Hood Hoodie
signatureSatinHood.description: Heavy fleece with a quiet satin-lined hood.
signatureSatinHood.longDescription: A dense 480 GSM cotton fleece hoodie cut with a relaxed European shoulder, deep ribbing, and AMAMBRA's satin-lined hood for a smooth luxury finish. It is the first signature piece: minimal, weighty, and built for daily city wear.
signatureSatinHood.material: 480 GSM organic cotton fleece, recycled satin hood lining, ribbed cotton cuffs
signatureSatinHood.care: Wash inside out at 30C. Do not tumble dry. Steam gently from reverse side.
signatureSatinHood.fit: Relaxed streetwear fit with dropped shoulder and structured hood.
signatureSatinHood.story: Designed in Stuttgart as the first AMAMBRA signature piece, the satin hood references ceremonial polish without turning heritage into costume.
signatureSatinHood.feature1: Satin-lined hood designed for comfort and hair protection
signatureSatinHood.feature3: Muted warm-gold embroidery inspired by geometric textile borders
signatureSatinHood.feature4: Deep ribbing engineered to hold shape after repeated wear
signatureSatinHood.seoDescription: AMAMBRA's heavyweight satin-lined hoodie in obsidian black and deep olive. Premium Afro-European streetwear from Stuttgart.

heritageTracksuit.title: Heritage Tracksuit
heritageTracksuit.description: A tailored tracksuit with understated heritage piping.
heritageTracksuit.longDescription: A coordinated jacket and trouser set in compact double-knit fabric with tonal paneling, muted gold zip pulls, and a clean straight-leg profile. Built for travel, studio days, and considered off-duty dressing.
heritageTracksuit.material: Organic cotton double knit, recycled polyester stretch yarn
heritageTracksuit.care: Wash at 30C with similar colors. Dry flat. Avoid fabric softener.
heritageTracksuit.fit: Jacket is boxy and cropped at the hip. Trouser is straight with a clean break.
heritageTracksuit.story: The tracksuit carries AMAMBRA's Afro-European balance: functional Stuttgart minimalism, movement-first comfort, and restrained trim inspired by ceremonial linework.
heritageTracksuit.feature1: Two-piece set with jacket and trouser
heritageTracksuit.feature2: Tonal heritage piping at pocket and side seam
heritageTracksuit.seoDescription: Premium AMAMBRA heritage tracksuit with tonal linework, muted gold hardware, and a tailored streetwear fit.

atelierOvershirt.title: Atelier Overshirt
atelierOvershirt.description: Structured overshirt for an editorial layering system.
atelierOvershirt.longDescription: A brushed cotton-twill overshirt with a sharp camp collar, hidden placket, matte snaps, and oversized patch pockets engineered for clean utility.
atelierOvershirt.material: Brushed organic cotton twill, corozo-style recycled buttons
atelierOvershirt.care: Machine wash cold. Hang dry. Iron on low from reverse.
atelierOvershirt.fit: Oversized through the body with a straight hem and relaxed sleeve.
atelierOvershirt.story: The Atelier Overshirt is the AMAMBRA answer to European minimal outerwear: grounded color, quiet utility, and a silhouette with calm authority.
atelierOvershirt.seoDescription: Structured premium overshirt by AMAMBRA with brushed twill, utility pockets, and a relaxed editorial silhouette.

satinLinedBeanie.title: Satin-Lined Beanie
satinLinedBeanie.description: Soft rib knit outside, smooth satin inside.
satinLinedBeanie.longDescription: A premium rib-knit beanie with a discreet AMAMBRA tab and satin lining designed to reduce friction while keeping a sculpted profile.
satinLinedBeanie.material: Merino blend rib knit, recycled satin lining, woven AMAMBRA tab
satinLinedBeanie.care: Hand wash cold. Reshape while damp. Dry flat.
satinLinedBeanie.fit: One size with a close luxury rib profile.
satinLinedBeanie.story: Made as a daily accessory with beauty and practicality in mind, the satin lining nods to hair care rituals and the intimacy of heritage-informed design.
satinLinedBeanie.seoDescription: AMAMBRA satin-lined rib knit beanie with a premium soft interior and minimal tab branding.

heritageCap.title: Heritage Cap
heritageCap.longDescription: A structured six-panel cap in washed cotton canvas with tonal AMAMBRA embroidery, antique gold adjuster, and a curved brim.
heritageCap.material: Washed organic cotton canvas, recycled metal adjuster
heritageCap.care: Spot clean only. Do not bleach. Air dry.
heritageCap.fit: Low-profile six-panel fit with adjustable back strap.
heritageCap.story: The Heritage Cap compresses the AMAMBRA visual language into an everyday object: subtle linework, calm proportion, and a Stuttgart streetwear attitude.
heritageCap.seoDescription: Low-profile AMAMBRA heritage cap in washed cotton canvas with tonal embroidery.

premiumEssentialTee.title: Premium Essential Tee
premiumEssentialTee.description: A refined heavyweight tee with a dry hand feel.
premiumEssentialTee.longDescription: A 260 GSM compact cotton tee with a clean collar, slightly boxy body, and understated chest mark for daily uniform dressing.
premiumEssentialTee.material: 260 GSM organic compact cotton, ribbed collar
premiumEssentialTee.care: Wash inside out at 30C. Do not tumble dry. Iron low.
premiumEssentialTee.fit: Slightly boxy with a clean sleeve length and straight hem.
premiumEssentialTee.story: The Essential Tee is intentionally restrained. It is designed to sit under the overshirt, work beneath the hoodie, and hold its own with tailored trousers.
premiumEssentialTee.seoDescription: Heavyweight AMAMBRA premium essential tee in compact organic cotton.
